meta.notes: Pretendard fonts loaded directly in this environment (no Noto workaround needed); all text bound to canonical text styles via setTextStyleIdAsync. All fills/strokes bound to Variables (0 raw hex after clearing default auto-layout white fills). Section fills bound to gray-dark/50.

componentSets.name: Video/Segment Gauge
componentSets.provisional: Level colors PROVISIONAL (HD-4): Congestion=blue-dark/350, Score=green-dark/350 only. No extended level palette. Set description carries this note.

boundVariables.name: color/surface/raised

boundVariables.name: color/status-card/text/error

boundVariables.name: blue-dark/350

boundVariables.name: green-dark/350
boundVariables.usage: gauge Score FILLED segments only (provisional foundation, KEPT per river). 6 paints preserved.

structureNotes.combineAsVariants: All 5 sets combined via combineAsVariants; each set set to VERTICAL auto-layout with padding+itemSpacing so variants pack compactly (no width blowup — widest set 678px).
structureNotes.detach: None needed — no cyclic self-containment (no variant embeds a sibling variant instance).
structureNotes.rename: Variant components renamed to Prop=Value before combine; sets named Video/{Name} slash-folder.
structureNotes.remap: N/A — all sets newly created (no pre-existing instances to remap).
structureNotes.layoutWrapperFills: 12 auto-layout wrapper frames had default white fills auto-added by createAutoLayout; cleared to transparent (fills=[]) to remove raw color.
structureNotes.textStyles: All text bound to canonical Pretendard text styles (title/16B, title/14B, body/14M, body/12M, body/12R, body/10M) via setTextStyleIdAsync.

selfCheck.rework_semantic_2026-07-10: COLOR REBIND ONLY (no structure/variant/font change). Foundation-dark background/placeholder fills were theme-locked (dark bg vs light-flipping text/border broke light-mode render). Rebound 22 fills across section 1020:2 subtree to Semantic (theme-flipping): gray-dark/50->color/bg/level-1 (1: section 1020:2), gray-dark/100->color/surface/raised (4: shell variants 1022:6/7/8/9), gray-dark/300->color/bg/level-3 (16: placeholders + gauge empty tracks + metric value placeholders 1023:9/11/12/13/17/25/26/34/35/39/46/47/51 + 1023:9225/9229/9234/9235), red-dark/350->color/status-card/text/error (1: Down-trend TEXT 1023:9235's sibling '▼ 8%'). Verified: 0 leftover foundation-source bindings; gauge FILLED segments preserved (blue-dark/350 x6 + green-dark/350 x6, unchanged per river provisional decision); text/*, line/gray/subtle, icon/gray, radius/8 untouched; full-subtree rescan of visible unbound SOLID paints (fills+strokes) = 0. Light-mode render confirmed correct (previously dark-locked bg now flips). Flip values: bg/level-1 L#fafafa/D#131418, surface/raised L#ffffff/D#1c1d23, bg/level-3 L#e9e9e9/D#24252c, status-card/text/error L#e50533/D#f06070.
selfCheck.rework_2026-07-10: section stroke removed, rawHex 0 re-scanned. Section 1020:2 had a raw #000000 unbound stroke (missed in original scan because prior scan didn't flag stroke paints); stroke removed (strokes=[]) as decorative section-boundary chrome, gray-dark/50 fill preserved+still bound. Full-page re-scan of VISIBLE unbound SOLID paints (fills+strokes) = 0 violations. Note: 14 white COMPONENT frame fills are visible:false (Figma default hidden background, not rendered) so correctly not violations. No other node changed.
